---
title: "Supplementary Materials"
output:
  word_document:
    reference_docx: default
bibliography: "pdfs/export_20250131/export_20250131.updated.sanitized.bib"
csl: "scripts/annual-reviews-alphabetical.csl"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

# Load the saved workspace
load(".RData")

# Function to sanitize bibtex IDs
sanitize_bibtex_id <- function(id) {
  gsub("_back--bud_", "_backbud_", id)
}

# Function to format citation keys into proper citation syntax
format_citations <- function(citation_list) {
  if (is.null(citation_list) || length(citation_list) == 0) {
    return(NA)
  }
  # Sanitize and format each citation key with @ prefix for pandoc citation processing
  citations <- sapply(citation_list, function(x) paste0("@", sanitize_bibtex_id(x)))
  paste0("(", paste(citations, collapse = "; "), ")")
}

# Function to format beetle families list
format_beetle_families <- function(families) {
  if (is.null(families) || length(families) == 0 || 
      all(is.na(families)) || identical(families, list(NULL))) {
    return("")
  }
  # Remove NAs and empty strings before joining
  clean_families <- families[!is.na(families) & families != ""]
  if (length(clean_families) == 0) return("")
  paste(unlist(clean_families), collapse = ", ")
}

# Function to safely handle list columns
safe_sapply <- function(x, fun) {
  if (is.list(x)) {
    vapply(x, fun, FUN.VALUE = character(1))
  } else {
    vapply(list(x), fun, FUN.VALUE = character(1))
  }
}

# Process the dataframe
formatted_df <- plant_family_output_df %>%
  mutate(
    # Convert boolean columns to Yes/No
    beetle_visitors = ifelse(beetle_visitors, "Yes", "No"),
    beetle_pollinators = ifelse(beetle_pollinators, "Yes", "No"),
    # Format beetle families as comma-separated lists
    beetle_families = safe_sapply(beetle_families, format_beetle_families),
    # Format citations
    references = safe_sapply(bibtex_ids, format_citations)
  ) %>%
  # Select and rename columns
  select(
    `Plant Family` = plant_family,
    `Beetle Visitors` = beetle_visitors,
    `Beetle Pollinators` = beetle_pollinators,
    `Beetle Families` = beetle_families,
    `References` = references
  )

```

```{r table, results='asis'}
# Create the table with caption
kable(formatted_df,
      caption = "Supplementary Table 2",
      format = "pandoc",
      align = c('l', 'c', 'c', 'l', 'l'),
      na.print = "") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = TRUE)
```

# References
